signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows lengthen; market cap slipping under heavy fog.
signals.questPulse: Scan for crypto wormholes before the plunge deepens.
signals.worldFeed: Global digital assets bleed value amidst rising dread.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of mass selloffs echo in the neon alleys.

signals.npcLine: Risk scanners spike on new cryptos, but RAVE stays dim.
signals.questPulse: Investigate silent nodes hiding under shadow protocols.
signals.worldFeed: New coins flood circuits; some pulse, others just noise.
signals.clueEvent: Spectral assets spike briefly then vanish from chain logs.

signals.npcLine: AAVE signals rising frequency; something brews in the data streams.
signals.questPulse: Trace high-frequency trades before regulators swarm.
signals.worldFeed: Unseen forces push AAVE wallets into overdrive.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden triggers detected in decentralized vault operations.

signals.npcLine: REQ and SIREN cryptos buzz; unstable currents ahead.
signals.questPulse: Match circuit pulses to predict next coin flares.
signals.worldFeed: Smaller tokens dance on brink, tempting desperate netrunners.
signals.clueEvent: Volatile microcaps show erratic chain patterns overnight.

signals.npcLine: Fear index cranks high; net spills uneven data streams.
signals.questPulse: Decode panic spikes in cryptonet chatter.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment sinks; traders clutch fading hopes tightly.
signals.clueEvent: Digital whispers hint at a looming market crash.
